segments.text: He pushed in, but 105% is already on the board. For a comeback from here, we gotta focus on building damage first.
segments.original_text: 押し込んでいきましたがすでに105%のダメージが入っているのでここからの逆転まずはダメージを稼ぐところからスタートしていきたいと思います

segments.text: That was so clean, so clean, so clean, but...
segments.original_text: うまいうまいうまかったのに

full_text: He pushed in, but 105% is already on the board. For a comeback from here, we gotta focus on building damage first. That was so clean, so clean, so clean, but...
